diagram_title: 渲染 Session-Scoped Data 使用 Explicit Freshness

activities.title: Stamp 已收到 Time 在 Incoming 事件
activities.description: Client reducer writes Date.now() 進入 store 項目's 已收到於 field whenever Session-scoped SSE 事件 arrives 供 given sid (DD-1 inline field, DD-4 無 靜默 fallback).

activities.title: tick Freshness Clock Every Second
activities.description: useFreshnessClock helper owns single 1-second setInterval that drives shared freshnessNow Solid signal; all freshness-aware memos subscribe 到 same signal (DD-2).

activities.title: Compute Fidelity 來自 已收到 Time
activities.description: 依-項目 freshness memo reads (freshnessNow - 已收到於) 與 compares against soft/hard thresholds 到 classify fidelity 作為 fresh / stale / hard-stale. 缺失 或 invalid 已收到於 forces hard-stale (DD-4).

activities.title: 渲染 UI 使用 Fidelity Aware Degradation
activities.description: Session page, side 面板, 工具 page consume fidelity classification 到 apply 依-component degradation (stale badge / card collapse / grayed elapsed). 提示輸入 does NOT subscribe 到 fidelity; it 僅 區塊 在 permission/問題 待處理 (DD-6 retires connection-狀態 coupling).

activities.title: Load Freshness Tweaks
activities.description: Client bootstrap fetches GET /設定/tweaks/前端 與 exposes uiSessionfreshness已啟用, uifreshnessthresholdsec, uifreshnesshardtimeoutsec 作為 Solid signals. Feature flag (DD-5) gates 4 degradation; thresholds (DD-3) drive 3 classification.

arrows.label: SSE 事件: Session.狀態 / Session.active-child.updated / monitor.*
Store 項目 使用 inline 已收到於
Feature flag uiSessionfreshness已啟用 (0 = bypass degradation)
Rendered UI (DOM, including stale hints / collapsed cards / grayed timers)
Solid fine-grained memos (依-項目) 在 session.tsx / session-side-panel.tsx / tool-page.tsx
